title: Raptor Encounter Photo Op
description: Track down the Raptor Encounter experience in Jurassic Park and snap a photo with Blue the Velociraptor. She's friendly… mostly. Find her near the Jurassic Park Discovery Center.
hint: Head toward the Discovery Center — you'll hear her before you see her.
clues: The Raptor Encounter is a live show near the Jurassic Park Discovery Center.
Check the park schedule for show times — Blue appears at specific intervals.

availability.availabilityNote: Live character interactions can vary by operations and show schedule.

title: Spider-Man's Hidden Camera
description: Outside The Amazing Adventures of Spider-Man ride, find the Daily Bugle newspaper stand with a hidden photo opportunity. Strike a web-slinging pose and capture the moment!
hint: Look for the Daily Bugle newspaper stand outside the ride entrance.
clues: The photo spot is in the plaza area just before you enter the Spider-Man ride queue.
Find the newspaper stand with the Daily Bugle headlines — strike your best Spidey pose!
